companies.description_zh: 美国最大的汽车保险公司之一，伯克希尔最大的非控股持仓，持有33%股权
companies.description_en: One of the largest auto insurers in the US, Berkshire's largest non-controlled holding at 33% equity interest
companies.key_quote_zh: 盖可保险可以说代表了最佳投资——将一项极其重要且极难复制的商业优势，与一个卓越的管理团队完美结合
companies.key_quote_en: GEICO represents the best of all investment worlds - the coupling of a very important and very hard to duplicate business advantage with an extraordinary management

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔持股60%的子公司，拥有韦斯科金融80%股份
companies.description_en: Subsidiary 60% owned by Berkshire, which owns 80% of Wesco Financial
companies.key_quote_zh: 伯克希尔持有60%股权的蓝筹印花属于完全并表类别
companies.key_quote_en: Blue Chip Stamps, 60% owned by Berkshire Hathaway Inc., falls into this category

companies.description_zh: 蓝筹印花持股80%的金融公司，由查理·芒格领导
companies.description_en: Financial company 80% owned by Blue Chip Stamps, led by Charlie Munger
companies.key_quote_zh: 韦斯科金融由伯克希尔控制但仅持有48%的股权
companies.key_quote_en: Wesco Financial, controlled by Berkshire but only 48% owned

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔旗下最大的保险子公司，由菲尔·列舍领导
companies.description_en: Berkshire's largest insurance subsidiary, led by Phil Liesche
companies.key_quote_zh: 国民保险公司的经理们在1980年超越了自我，承保利润率创历史新高
companies.key_quote_en: The National Indemnity managers outdid themselves in 1980, with underwriting margins at an all-time high

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔旗下的糖果制造商，以品牌忠诚度著称
companies.description_en: Berkshire-owned candy manufacturer known for brand loyalty
companies.key_quote_zh: 喜诗糖果1980年税后收益421.2万美元
companies.key_quote_en: See's Candies generated $4.2 million in after-tax earnings in 1980

aliases: Illinois National Bank and Trust of Rockford
companies.description_zh: Rockford的银行，于1980年12月31日从伯克希尔分拆
companies.description_en: Rockford bank spun off from Berkshire on December 31, 1980
companies.key_quote_zh: 吉恩·阿贝格执掌伊利诺伊国民银行将近50年
companies.key_quote_en: Gene Abegg ran Illinois National Bank for almost 50 years

companies.description_zh: 由本·罗斯纳经营的零售连锁，1981年3月7日将庆祝50周年
companies.description_en: Retail chain operated by Ben Rosner, celebrating 50th anniversary March 7, 1981
companies.key_quote_zh: 本·罗斯纳的业绩继续让我们惊叹，在零售业惨淡的一年中收益依然出色
companies.key_quote_en: Ben Rosner's record at Associated Retail Stores continues to amaze us

companies.description_zh: 由路易·文森蒂和查理·芒格重新定位的储贷机构
companies.description_en: Savings and loan institution repositioned by Louie Vincenti and Charlie Munger
companies.key_quote_zh: 请特别留意路易·文森蒂和查理·芒格在重新定位互助储贷业务方面所做的出色工作
companies.key_quote_en: Particularly note the superb job done by Louie Vincenti and Charlie Munger in repositioning Mutual Savings and Loan

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔旗下工伤赔偿保险公司，由米尔特·桑顿领导
companies.description_en: Berkshire workers compensation insurer led by Milt Thornton
companies.key_quote_zh: 赛普拉斯保险公司继续保持着出色的业绩
companies.key_quote_en: Cypress Insurance Company continues its outstanding record

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔的持股之一，成本1,062.8万美元，市值4,227.7万美元
companies.key_quote_zh: 伯克希尔持有华盛顿邮报约186.86万股
companies.key_quote_en: Berkshire holds approximately 1.87 million shares of Washington Post

companies.description_zh: 保险公司，其年报分析被巴菲特推荐
companies.description_en: Insurance company whose annual report analysis Buffett recommends
companies.key_quote_zh: 丘博的年报一贯呈现业内最深刻、坦诚且文笔出色的行业状况讨论
companies.key_quote_en: Chubb's annual report consistently presents the most insightful, candid discussion of industry conditions

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔持股198.38万股，成本6,250.7万美元，市值5,988.9万美元
companies.description_en: Berkshire holding of 1.98M shares, cost $62.5M, market $59.9M
companies.key_quote_zh: 伯克希尔持有通用食品198.38万股
companies.key_quote_en: Berkshire holds 1,983,812 shares of General Foods

people.description_zh: 伯克希尔副董事长，韦斯科金融董事长
people.description_en: Berkshire Vice Chairman, Chairman of Wesco Financial
people.key_quote_zh: 请特别留意查理·芒格在重新定位互助储贷业务方面所做的出色工作
people.key_quote_en: Note the superb job done by Charlie Munger in repositioning Mutual Savings and Loan

people.description_zh: 盖可保险CEO，1976年将公司从破产边缘挽救回来
people.description_en: GEICO CEO who rescued the company from bankruptcy in 1976
people.key_quote_zh: 杰克·伯恩在上任后大量提供了盖可保险起死回生所需的卓越管理能力
people.key_quote_en: Jack Byrne, upon arrival in 1976, supplied managerial brilliance in abundance for GEICO's resuscitation

people.description_zh: 国民保险公司总裁，承保纪律的坚定执行者
people.description_en: President of National Indemnity,坚定的承保纪律执行者
people.key_quote_zh: 菲尔·列舍领导国民保险在1980年超越自我，承保利润率创历史新高
people.key_quote_en: Phil Liesche led National Indemnity to outdo themselves in 1980

people.description_zh: 伊利诺伊国民银行创始人，1980年7月2日去世，享年82岁
people.description_en: Founder of Illinois National Bank, died July 2, 1980 at age 82
people.key_quote_zh: 吉恩·阿贝格，作为朋友、银行家和公民，他都是无人能出其右的
people.key_quote_en: Gene Abegg, as a friend, a banker, and a citizen, he was without peer

people.description_zh: 工伤赔偿保险专家，1980年去世，享年37岁
people.description_en: Workers compensation specialist, died in 1980 at age 37
people.key_quote_zh: 弗兰克·德纳多天生就有承保人的直觉，是一位出色的技术专家和强悍的竞争者
people.key_quote_en: Frank DeNardo instinctively thought like an underwriter, a superb technician and fierce competitor

people.description_zh: 接替德纳多管理工伤赔偿保险业务
people.description_en: Took over workers compensation after DeNardo's death
people.key_quote_zh: 丹·格罗斯曼在弗兰克去世后立即接手，继续运营工伤赔偿业务
people.key_quote_en: Dan Grossman stepped in immediately after Frank's death to continue that operation

people.description_zh: 赛普拉斯保险公司总裁，工伤赔偿保险的典范
people.description_en: President of Cypress Insurance, model for workers compensation
people.key_quote_zh: 米尔特·桑顿运营着一个远远领先于竞争对手的承保业务
people.key_quote_en: Milt Thornton runs an underwriting operation that far outpaces his competition

people.key_quote_zh: 乔治·扬继续为我们在这项业务中做着一流的工作
people.key_quote_en: George Young continues to do a first-class job for us in this business

people.description_zh: 联合零售商店经营者，1931年起经营该公司
people.description_en: Operator of Associated Retail Stores since 1931
people.key_quote_zh: 本·罗斯纳的业绩继续让我们惊叹
people.key_quote_en: Ben Rosner's record continues to amaze us

people.description_zh: 互助储贷业务重新定位的关键人物
people.description_en: Key figure in repositioning Mutual Savings and Loan
people.key_quote_zh: 路易·文森蒂在重新定位互助储贷业务方面做出了出色的工作
people.key_quote_en: Louie Vincenti did a superb job repositioning Mutual Savings and Loan

people.description_zh: 丘博保险分析师，发表了关于保险行业竞争态势的精彩分析
people.description_en: Chubb analyst who published excellent analysis of insurance competitive dynamics
people.key_quote_zh: 芭芭拉·斯图尔特的分析虽然不令人愉快，但我们认为它非常可能是准确的
people.key_quote_en: Mrs. Stewart's analysis may not be cheerful, but we think it is very likely to be accurate

people.description_zh: 国民保险公司创始人，建立了严格的承保纪律
people.description_en: Founder of National Indemnity who established strict underwriting discipline
people.key_quote_zh: 承保纪律由创始人杰克·林沃尔特从公司创立之初便植入其中
people.key_quote_en: Underwriting discipline embedded from origin by the founder, Jack Ringwalt

concepts.description_zh: 公司留存在业务中的收益，其价值取决于资金的使用效率和后续回报水平
concepts.description_en: Earnings retained in the business; value depends on how capital is deployed and returns generated
concepts.key_quote_zh: 留存收益的价值并不取决于我们持有的是100%、50%、20%还是1%的股权
concepts.key_quote_en: The value of retained earnings is not determined by whether we own 100%, 50%, 20% or 1% of the businesses

concepts.description_zh: 投资的真实价值，与市场价格不同步
concepts.description_en: True value of an investment, different from market price
concepts.key_quote_zh: 如果一家优秀的企业在市场上以远低于内在价值的价格出售
concepts.key_quote_en: If a fine business is selling in the market place for far less than intrinsic value

concepts.description_zh: 未入账的留存收益可能超过报告收益，就像冰山只有一小部分浮出水面
concepts.description_en: Unbooked retained earnings may exceed reported earnings, like an iceberg with only a small portion visible
concepts.key_quote_zh: 按照传统会计方法，我们的收益冰山只有不到一半浮出了水面
concepts.key_quote_en: Conventional accounting only allows less than half of our earnings iceberg to appear above the surface

concepts.description_zh: 高通胀对资本造成的隐性税收，导致名义正回报可能变成实际负回报
concepts.description_en: Hidden tax on capital caused by high inflation, turning nominal positive returns into real negative returns
concepts.key_quote_zh: 高通胀率相当于对资本额外征了一次税
concepts.key_quote_en: High rates of inflation create a tax on capital

concepts.description_zh: 只有股本回报率上升，即不需追加资本收益就能与物价水平同步增长，才是真正的抗通胀
concepts.description_en: Only rising ROE where earnings grow proportionally with prices without additional capital constitutes true inflation hedging
concepts.key_quote_zh: 要让资本真正实现指数化增长，股本回报率必须上升
concepts.key_quote_en: For capital to be truly indexed, return on equity must rise

concepts.description_zh: 不顾预期承保亏损承接业务以获取资金进行投资的做法
concepts.description_en: Writing business regardless of expected underwriting losses to obtain funds for investment
concepts.key_quote_zh: 行业媒体对现金流承保批评甚多
concepts.key_quote_en: There is much criticism in the trade press of cash flow underwriting

concepts.description_zh: 保险行业衡量承保盈利能力的指标（赔付率+费用率），超过100%表示承保亏损
concepts.description_en: Insurance metric (loss ratio + expense ratio); above 100% indicates underwriting loss
concepts.key_quote_zh: 综合比率从1979年的100.6上升至1980年的估计值103.5
concepts.key_quote_en: The combined ratio rising from 100.6 in 1979 to an estimated 103.5 in 1980

concepts.description_zh: 持股20%-50%时，按比例计入被投资公司净收益的会计方法
concepts.description_en: Accounting method that includes proportionate share of investee net income for 20-50% ownership
concepts.key_quote_zh: 超过20%的持股应当按照被投资公司方式处理
concepts.key_quote_en: An interest over 20% would qualify as an investee holding

concepts.description_zh: 从财务困境中恢复的企业，通常需要管理层的根本性改变
concepts.description_en: Business recovering from financial distress, usually requiring fundamental management change
concepts.key_quote_zh: 购买和经营困境反转型企业通常令人失望
concepts.key_quote_en: Disappointments that usually result from purchase and operation of turnaround businesses

concepts.description_zh: 企业长期保持的、难以复制的竞争优势
concepts.description_en: Long-term, hard-to-replicate competitive advantage of a business
concepts.key_quote_zh: 盖可保险此前一直享有的根本性商业优势在公司内部始终完好无损
concepts.key_quote_en: The fundamental business advantage GEICO had enjoyed was still intact within the company
